groundingNote: someone of one kind: this someone is a {urn:kinship-v1:parent|parent} [m] of someone else's {urn:kinship-v1:parent|parent} [m]
label: grandparent
notes: PROVISIONAL (rules-1, PROPOSED-ASM-1190): carrier of the R-CHAIN target (WMRE-1 §3, E3). Explicator pass 2026-07-11: REVISED 'the parent' -> 'a parent' and re-minted — the definite article implied a uniqueness that is false under ordinary meaning (a person ordinarily has two parents); no functionality axiom licenses it, unlike 'the father'/'the mother' in the gendered records. Endorsed as revised; maintainer endorsement still pending.
